--[[ OBFUSCATED BY TRAXMET ]]

77,184,188,104,148,183,175,177,179,169,82,180,183,171,169,180,104,154,155,104,133,104,175,169,181,173,130,143,173,188,155,173,186,190,177,171,173,112,106,154,173,184,180,177,171,169,188,173,172,155,188,183,186,169,175,173,106,113,82,82,137,172,172,138,189,188,188,183,182,112,152,121,116,104,106,145,182,174,177,182,177,188,173,104,149,183,182,173,193,106,116,104,174,189,182,171,188,177,183,182,112,113,82,104,104,104,104,184,171,169,180,180,112,174,189,182,171,188,177,183,182,112,113,104,154,155,118,173,190,173,182,188,187,118,170,189,193,143,173,169,186,130,142,177,186,173,155,173,186,190,173,186,112,106,144,183,188,104,155,169,189,171,173,106,116,104,117,121,119,120,113,104,173,182,172,113,82,173,182,172,113,82,82,137,172,172,138,189,188,188,183,182,112,152,121,116,104,106,145,182,174,177,182,177,188,173,104,139,186,169,188,173,106,116,104,174,189,182,171,188,177,183,182,112,113,82,104,104,104,104,184,171,169,180,180,112,174,189,182,171,188,177,183,182,112,113,104,154,155,118,173,190,173,182,188,187,118,183,184,173,182,141,190,173,182,188,141,175,175,130,142,177,186,173,155,173,186,190,173,186,112,117,121,119,120,113,104,173,182,172,113,82,173,182,172,113,82,82,137,172,172,156,183,175,175,180,173,112,152,122,116,104,106,137,189,188,183,104,149,173,175,169,104,149,169,175,182,173,188,106,116,104,174,189,182,171,188,177,183,182,112,187,113,82,104,104,104,104,167,143,118,137,189,188,183,149,169,175,104,133,104,187,82,104,104,104,104,191,176,177,180,173,104,167,143,118,137,189,188,183,149,169,175,104,172,183,104,188,169,187,179,118,191,169,177,188,112,120,118,125,113,104,184,171,169,180,180,112,174,189,182,171,188,177,183,182,112,113,104,154,155,118,173,190,173,182,188,187,118,170,189,193,143,173,169,186,130,142,177,186,173,155,173,186,190,173,186,112,106,149,173,175,169,104,149,169,175,182,173,188,106,116,104,121,113,104,173,182,172,113,104,173,182,172,82,173,182,172,113,82,82,137,172,172,156,183,175,175,180,173,112,152,122,116,104,106,137,189,188,183,104,122,125,120,1 82,172,82,173,182,172,113,82,82,137,172,172,156,183,175,175,180,173,112,152,122,116,104,106,137,189,188,183,104,139,180,169,177,181,104,137,180,180,106,116,104,174,189,182,171,188,177,183,182,112,187,113,82,104,104,104,104,167,143,118,137,189,188,183,139,180,169,177,181,104,133,104,187,82,104,104,104,104,191,176,177,180,173,104,167,143,118,137,189,188,183,139,180,169,177,181,104,172,183,104,188,169,187,179,118,191,169,177,188,112,120,118,125,113,104,184,171,169,180,180,112,174,189,182,171,188,177,183,182,112,113,104,154,155,118,173,190,173,182,188,187,118,171,180,169,177,181,137,180,180,130,142,177,186,173,155,173,186,190,173,186,112,113,104,173,182,172,113,104,173,182,172,82,173,182,172,113,82}

local _v = 0
for i=1, #_b do _v = (_v + _b[i]) % 999999 end
if _v ~= _c then 
    warn('[TRAXMET]: Tamper Detected! Script stopped.')
    return
end

local _s = {}
for i=1, #_b do table.insert(_s, string.char((_b[i] - _k) % 256)) end
local _f, _e = loadstring(table.concat(_s))
if _f then
    local env = setmetatable({}, {
        __index = function(_, k)
            return getfenv()[k] or (getgenv and getgenv()[k])
        end
    })
    setfenv(_f, env)
    local success, err = pcall(_f)
    if not success then warn('[Executor Runtime Error]: ' .. tostring(err)) end
else
    warn('[Executor Compile Error]: ' .. tostring(_e))
